sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time64 (event_id UInt8, event_time Time64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_time64 WHERE event_time > toTime64('00:00:00', 3);
UPDATE test_time64 SET event_time = toTime64('05:00:00.123', 3) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, CAST(event_time AS String) AS time_string FROM test_time64 WHERE event_time < toTime64('12:00:00', 3);
